results.summary: Found implementation evidence of Neighbor Discovery Protocol (NDP) with Router Advertisement handling and option processing. Code contains 45 ndp-related references, 2 Router symbols (E-00000321, E-00000322), 15 ICMPv6 references, 9 RFC 4861 citations, and option/prefix/MTU processing code consistent with RFC 4861 Sections 4.6.2 and 6.3.4.

Found evidence of proxy and anycast Neighbor Advertisement implementation with delay mechanisms. Code contains 17 proxy-related references, 13 anycast references, and 50 delay-related references. Implementation appears to support proxy NA behavior with random delay as specified in RFC 4861 Section 7.2.8.

Found evidence of proxy Neighbor Advertisement implementation (17 proxy references), but search for 'unsolicited' returned 0 hits. The codebase appears to have proxy NA capability but may not have explicit unsolicited NA implementation as required by RFC 4861 Section 7.2.6.

No evidence of MLD (Multicast Listener Discovery) implementation found. Searches for 'MLD', 'Listener', and 'RFC 2710' all returned 0 hits. The codebase does not appear to implement RFC 2710 MLD packet handling for delivery to the IPv6/ICMPv6 stack.

issue.title: MLD implementation missing - RFC 2710 not implemented
